creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Oleg Sidorkin from comment #13)

Thanks Oleg.

Emmanuel: Could you please confirm that the patch is still maintainer approved (I see you set the mainter-feedback flag and wrote that the patch is fine for you; I guess I can consider it equivalent to setting the maintainer-approval flag). In case you confirm, could you please commit it or do you prefer I do it?
